title: これも普通の努力です！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear someone talking rather animatedly from
the training track's stands and head over to check
things out...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I see, I see! I gotta save that move for
later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! Look at her run! She's just incredible!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she used her pivot foot to do that?
Ooh, she broke away from the pack so cleanly...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello! Are you here to watch the others as
they train too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here really is amazing. It's like, they're
not Tracen students for nothing, you know?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The way that racer accelerates in the final stretch
is so awesome.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The timing of her last spurt was unbelievable too!
I should really ask how she does it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Also, the racer over there has an incredible
amount of stamina!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, she's the one that always eats mountains
of food at lunch. That must be the key, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention Ikuno Dictus over there doing
some solo training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? I think they're pretty average, actually.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really don't have any special skills of my own, so
watching everyone closely is the least I can do.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always get so excited whenever I
discover someone new and amazing.
choice_data_list: You catch on to their styles so fast.
You have a very special power.
You have a very special power.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always get so excited whenever I
discover someone new and amazing.
choice_data_list: You catch on to their styles so fast.
You have a very special power.
You have a very special power.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you flatterer! Praising me will get you
nowhere, you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
'Sides, I know better than anyone else how
average I—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Wait a minute. Why is Ikuno using her legs like
that? That's different than what she usually
does...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Could it be? Is she trying out a new form? Ooh,
what could it be?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I really gotta find out! Hey, Ikuno!
Heeeey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser runs off at a speed that can
hardly be considered "average."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Don't flatter me like that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really am just a very average Umamusume... Oh,
hold on. Has Ikuno finished training already?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I want to go over there and help her
out.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She used a lot of equipment, so I'm sure she'll
need a hand putting everything away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'll actually be of much help, but
cleanup will still be faster with two people than
one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser helps clean up with way
more than average strength, and the task is done
in the blink of an eye.
